Whitepaper Audit

xuirin Finance is revolutionizing the DeFi landscape through its advanced offerings like Futuristic DeFi Debit Cards, Intelligent Crypto Payment Gateway, AI-Enhanced Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Lending, and a Multi-Chain, Non-Custodial, Highly Secure DeFi Wallet, all designed to transform international transaction methods.

xuirin DeFi Debit Card

xuirin DeFi Debit Cards are transforming the way we access and secure finances, ensuring privacy with anonymous transactions free from KYC requirements.
The benefits of using xuirin DeFi Debit Cards include:

  • Privacy Assurance: Conduct transactions anonymously, without KYC processes.
  • Everyday Utility: Ideal for all types of transactions, be it online shopping or dining out.
  • Worldwide Use: Seamlessly usable both locally and internationally.
  • Fast and Secure Transactions: Experience quick, safe payment processes.
  • ATM Compatibility: Withdraw cash globally.
  • Enhanced Security: Safe, anonymous transactions with funds secured in xuirin's non-custodial DeFi wallet.
  • Rewarding Experience: Benefit from a rewards program that turns spending into earning.
  • Exclusive Perks: Gain complimentary access to airport lounges around the world.

Featured in

Discover What the Media is Saying About Xuirin

Incentives and Level Structure

Discover unparalleled benefits with xuirin's DeFi Debit Cards, symbolizing true financial liberation. Our tiered structure – Silver, Gold, and Diamond – enhances each transaction with escalating cashback rewards. Silver tier users enjoy 2.5% cashback, Gold members receive 4%, and Diamond cardholders are at the forefront with a generous 8% cashback.

Real-World
Crypto Adoption.

xuirin Finance is dedicated to connecting the cryptocurrency world with practical, real-world applications. Our vision transcends online transactions; we're focused on ushering cryptocurrency into daily life like never before. Recognizing that genuine adoption encompasses more than just digital interactions, we are at the forefront of merging cryptocurrency with real-life utility in innovative ways.

best service for you

An all-encompassing DeFi package, featuring a non-custodial wallet, swap aggregator, DeFi debit cards, a payment gateway, AI-driven P2P lending, and perpetual futures/options trading, designed for smooth and comprehensive cryptocurrency management.

What is xuirin?

xuirin emerges as a versatile DeFi token, anchored in the Ethereum mainnet and compliant with the ERC20 protocol. Possessing a total supply of 1 billion (1,000,000,000), xuirin is the lifeblood of the xuirin Finance ecosystem. It propels decentralized dealings and energizes the pioneering financial offerings that are central to our platform's identity.

Welcome to the FAQ Hub!

Get in Touch

xuirin Finance offers a diverse range of financial solutions within its DeFi ecosystem, encompassing services like DeFi debit cards, intelligent payment systems, peer-to-peer lending, and a fortified wallet. Its goal is to transform the approach to financial dealings in the digital era.

xuirin represents a governance token fueled by community involvement for the xuirin Finance platform. It empowers holders with a role in decision-making, enabling them to influence the development and direction of the ecosystem.

Currently, xuirin Finance (xuirin) is undergoing its presale stage, indicating it's not yet listed on standard crypto exchanges or DeFi platforms such as Uniswap. Be vigilant against scams falsely claiming to be associated with xuirin.

To genuinely partake in the xuirin presale, the sole authorized method is via our official site at https://xuirin.com. Please be careful and verify that you are using the official site to prevent falling prey to any deceptive activities.

For comprehensive steps on purchasing xuirin tokens, refer to our "How to Buy" guide available at https://xuirin.com/how-to-buy.

Your xuirin tokens will become available for claiming once the presale period ends. The process for claiming these tokens will be conducted through the official xuirin website.

The option to pre-order xuirin's DeFi debit cards will be accessible as soon as our application launches on the App Store and Google Play Store. To learn more, please download our whitepaper.
